name: gitworkflow
description: Smart Git workflow engine — repo-aware Git Flow branching, CI monitoring & auto-merge, submodule handling, issue analysis/routing across coding-agent worktrees, deploy-workflow isolation, and changelog awareness. Bundles 8 workflow playbooks (Commit, Branch, Release, PullRequest, CIMerge, Submodule, IssueAnalysis, DeployWorkflow) plus a reusable issue-labeler GitHub Action template.
